blended.narrative: Sundown Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: dry, highs of 44°F, winds around 23 mph.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 33°F, winds around 24 mph. Expect wet, heavy snow.
